config.description: Wrap status messages in proper landmark with role

testCases.expectedFix: Messages should not use contentinfo landmark

commands: ddev drush cset system.theme default olivero -y
ddev drush cset system.theme admin claro -y

runContext.note: Evaluator applies deterministic theme setup and explicit runtime condition overrides for each test.

violations.description: Ensure the contentinfo landmark is at top level
violations.help: Contentinfo landmark should not be contained in another landmark

any.message: The contentinfo landmark is contained in another landmark.

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The contentinfo landmark is contained in another landmark.

violations.description: Ensure the document has at most one contentinfo landmark
violations.help: Document should not have more than one contentinfo landmark

any.message: Document has more than one contentinfo landmark

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one contentinfo landmark

violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks

setupSteps: ddev drush cset system.theme default olivero -y
ddev drush cset system.theme admin claro -y
testFlow: Navigate to each test case URL under requested conditions and capture baseline evidence.
Clear Drupal cache with: ddev drush cache-rebuild
Revisit same URL + conditions and capture post-patch evidence.
replication.expectedProof: Problem must be observed before patch and not observed after patch under the same recorded conditions.
